calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chet Chou, Esq. (415-673-5600) of Goldstein, Gellman for Plaintiff/Moving party ALLAN MCKILLOP.
Philip Snow, Dennis Jump (415-431-4904) for Defendants/opposing party in Pro Per.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ALLAN MCKILLOP'S Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. Order is signed.(see scanned order for details) Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
